info.name: DocuSeal Integration
info.summary: Request and manage electronic signatures on your documents using DocuSeal, directly from Nextcloud Files
info.description:
**DocuSeal Integration** brings enterprise-grade electronic signature capabilities directly into Nextcloud, eliminating the need for external e-signature platforms while keeping full control over your data with a self-hosted DocuSeal instance.
### Signing Workflows
- **Direct upload signing** — right-click any PDF, DOCX or image file in the Files app and request signatures immediately, without pre-configuring templates - **Template-based signing** — select from pre-configured DocuSeal templates for standardized processes such as contracts, NDAs, and agreements - **Interactive template builder** — drag-and-drop signature, date, and text fields onto documents without leaving Nextcloud - **Mixed recipients** — combine Nextcloud users (with autocomplete and avatars) and external email addresses in the same request - **Embedded signing** — signers can complete their signature directly inside Nextcloud via an embedded interface, or receive a signing link by email
### Tracking and Management
- **File sidebar panel** — a dedicated "Signatures" tab shows per-signer status (pending, sent, opened, completed, declined) with a visual progress bar - **Real-time updates** — webhook integration delivers instant status changes; a background job polls every 15 minutes as fallback - **Nextcloud notifications** — receive alerts when a signer completes, declines, or when all signatures are collected - **Activity log** — every signature event (requested, completed, declined, cancelled) is recorded in the Nextcloud Activity app - **Reminders and cancellation** — resend reminder emails to individual signers or cancel pending requests at any time - **Expiration dates** — set optional deadlines after which signing is no longer possible
### Signed Documents
- **Automatic download** — completed documents are saved back to Nextcloud with a timestamped filename (e.g. `contract_signed_20260326_143000.pdf`) - **Audit trail** — view a detailed timeline for each signer and download the official DocuSeal PDF audit log for compliance and legal records
### Dashboard and Search
- **Dashboard widget** — shows your most recent signature requests with status at a glance - **Unified search** — find signature requests by filename or status from Nextcloud's global search bar
### Security
- API credentials encrypted at rest using Nextcloud's encryption service - Webhook validation via HMAC-SHA256 shared secret - Time-limited JWT tokens for the template builder - HMAC-protected file download tokens with 10-minute expiry - Full user isolation — each user only sees their own requests
### Multilingual
Available in **English**, **Italian**, **German**, **French**, and **Spanish**.
### Getting Started
1. Install and enable the app 2. Go to **Settings → Connected accounts → DocuSeal** 3. Enter your DocuSeal server URL and API key 4. Optionally configure the webhook URL displayed in the settings panel 5. Right-click any PDF or DOCX in the Files app and select **Request signature with DocuSeal**
Requires a self-hosted [DocuSeal](https://www.docuseal.com) Enterprise instance (Nextcloud 28–34, PHP 8.1+).
info.author: GEST CE
